'''鈭歴-r-m''' ('''kasaram''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:penelopize|penelopize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-r-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:penelopize|penelopize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-r-m
|-
! Lemma
| kasaram
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisaram|thisaram]] || [[word:jisaram|jisaram]] || [[word:shisaram|shisaram]] || [[word:kisaram|kisaram]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusaram|thuthusaram]] || [[word:jujusaram|jujusaram]] || [[word:shushusaram|shushusaram]] || [[word:kukusaram|kukusaram]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusaram|thusaram]] || [[word:jusaram|jusaram]] || [[word:shusaram|shusaram]] || [[word:kusaram|kusaram]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusaram|thusaram]] || [[word:jusaram|jusaram]] || [[word:shusaram|shusaram]] || [[word:kusaram|kusaram]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesaram|thesaram]] || [[word:jesaram|jesaram]] || [[word:shesaram|shesaram]] || [[word:kesaram|kesaram]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosaram|thothosaram]] || [[word:jojosaram|jojosaram]] || [[word:shoshosaram|shoshosaram]] || [[word:kokosaram|kokosaram]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosaram|thosaram]] || [[word:josaram|josaram]] || [[word:shosaram|shosaram]] || [[word:kosaram|kosaram]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosaram|thosaram]] || [[word:josaram|josaram]] || [[word:shosaram|shosaram]] || [[word:kosaram|kosaram]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:saram|saram]] || [[word:saram|saram]] || [[word:saram|saram]] || [[word:saram|saram]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:saram|saram]] || [[word:saram|saram]] || [[word:saram|saram]] || [[word:saram|saram]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:saram|saram]] || [[word:saram|saram]] || [[word:saram|saram]] || [[word:saram|saram]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:saram|saram]] || [[word:saram|saram]] || [[word:saram|saram]] || [[word:saram|saram]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙saram|th忙saram]] || [[word:j忙saram|j忙saram]] || [[word:sh忙saram|sh忙saram]] || [[word:k忙saram|k忙saram]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasaram|thathasaram]] || [[word:jajasaram|jajasaram]] || [[word:shashasaram|shashasaram]] || [[word:kakasaram|kakasaram]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasaram|thasaram]] || [[word:jasaram|jasaram]] || [[word:shasaram|shasaram]] || [[word:kasaram|kasaram]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasaram|thasaram]] || [[word:jasaram|jasaram]] || [[word:shasaram|shasaram]] || [[word:kasaram|kasaram]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasaram|shasaram]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasaram|goshasaram]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasaram|gokishasaram]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasaramn眉|shasaramn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasaramnkn眉|goshasaramnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasaramn眉|gokishasaramn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasaramsh毛|shasaramsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasaramnksh毛|goshasaramnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasaramsh毛|gokishasaramsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasaramro|shasaramro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasaramnkro|goshasaramnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasaramro|gokishasaramro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasarammu|shasarammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasaramnkmu|goshasaramnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasarammu|gokishasarammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasaramsher|shasaramsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasaramnksher|goshasaramnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasaramsher|gokishasaramsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasaramng|shasaramng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasaramnkng|goshasaramnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasaramng|gokishasaramng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasaramya|shasaramya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasaramnkya|goshasaramnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasaramya|gokishasaramya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasaramyam|shasaramyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasaramnkyam|goshasaramnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasaramyam|gokishasaramyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasaramn眉sh毛|shasaramn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasaramnkn眉sh毛|goshasaramnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasaramn眉sh毛|gokishasaramn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasaramn眉ro|shasaramn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasaramnkn眉ro|goshasaramnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasaramn眉ro|gokishasaramn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasaramn眉mu|shasaramn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasaramnkn眉mu|goshasaramnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasaramn眉mu|gokishasaramn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasaramsh毛n眉|shasaramsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasaramnksh毛n眉|goshasaramnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasaramsh毛n眉|gokishasaramsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasaramsh毛ro|shasaramsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasaramnksh毛ro|goshasaramnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasaramsh毛ro|gokishasaramsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasaramsh毛mu|shasaramsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasaramnksh毛mu|goshasaramnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasaramsh毛mu|gokishasaramsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasaramron眉|shasaramron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasaramnkron眉|goshasaramnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasaramron眉|gokishasaramron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasaramrosh毛|shasaramrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasaramnkrosh毛|goshasaramnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasaramrosh毛|gokishasaramrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasaramromu|shasaramromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasaramnkromu|goshasaramnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasaramromu|gokishasaramromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasarammun眉|shasarammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasaramnkmun眉|goshasaramnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasarammun眉|gokishasarammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasarammush毛|shasarammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasaramnkmush毛|goshasaramnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasarammush毛|gokishasarammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasarammuro|shasarammuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasaramnkmuro|goshasaramnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasarammuro|gokishasarammuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
